notes: A locomotion animation state-machine (R-SYS-008): idle -> walk -> run, gated on a `speed` control parameter, plus a turn state. Each state plays a DCC-imported clip (R-ASSET-001); the animation package evaluates the transitions deterministically and blends the active clip's root motion into the entity transform. This is the authored ctx:anim-graph few-shot form an AI author should emit.
